what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record: it declares that a dragnet run is attached to the design-knowledge channel memory.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-1c49b7b2 for channel design-knowledge.
The target is a run:// URI pointing to corpus/company/dragnet/design-knowledge/1782139178.
An ISO 8601 added timestamp is present: 2026-06-22T14:42:25.532977+00:00.
standouts: attachment_type dragnet_runs links the channel to an external run artifact.
The target uses a run:// URI scheme rather than a file path.
No explanatory body or result payload is included.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata keys: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added.
Represents attachments as standalone .md files in channel-memory/channel_attachments/.
Uses a URI-style target reference for external run artifacts.
concerns: The file has no body, so the reason for the attachment is not stated.
The run:// target is opaque unless the run corpus is resolvable.
There is no author, source, or status field for the attachment.
notes: A bare attachment stub that records a dragnet run reference for the design-knowledge channel, useful only with the referenced run corpus.
questions: What does dragnet run 1782139178 contain or produce?
Why was this run attached to the design-knowledge channel?
Who or what process added this attachment?
Is the run:// URI resolvable within this repository?
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific dragnet run over the design-knowledge corpus is associated with the channel memory, so the run can be retrieved or audited later.
novelty: The use of a run:// URI target and an attachment_type of dragnet_runs is distinctive; otherwise the file is a conventional metadata stub.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped attachment record that associates the design-knowledge channel with a specific dragnet run target, preserving a provenance link without embedding the run contents.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter-only channel attachment metadata file linking the design-knowledge channel to dragnet run 1782139178 via a run:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a dragnet run on the design-knowledge corpus is attached to the channel memory for traceability.
